title: Guf (NTE)
wikitext: [[Guf|NGE]] '''NTE''' The '''Doors of Guf''' (ガフの扉, ''Gafu no Tobira'') appear in the form of a black void surrounded by multicolored rings. The events at the end of ''[[Evangelion 2.0]]'' resulted in [[Near Third Impact]], wherein Shinji's attempt to save Rei from the [[Zeruel|10th Angel]] caused [[Eva-01]] to open the Doors of Guf. The Door formed from Eva-01's [[halo]] and was surrounded by slowly rotating red and white rings. The portal was dissipated when Eva-01 was struck with the [[Spear of Cassius]], but it is unknown if the Door was fully closed after this event. In ''[[Evangelion 3.0]]'', an awakened [[Eva-13]] opens the Doors of Guf during [[Fourth Impact]]. This Door is larger than the previous version and surrounded by multicoloured rotating rings. It is closed after Kaworu impales Eva-13 with two [[Spear of Longinus|Spears of Longinus]]. ''[[Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0]]'' reveals that the space behind the Doors of Guf is called [[Anti-Universe]]. {{MontageBox |title=Door of Guf Portals |float=left |columns=2 |image1=[[Image:Eva2-22 C1846.jpg|thumb|250px|The Door opened by [[Eva-01]].]] |image2=[[Image:Eva2-22 C1856 vortex.jpg|thumb|250px|A view of the Door from above.]] |image3=[[Image:Eva3-33 C1418.jpg|thumb|250px| The Door opened during [[Fourth Impact]].]] |image4=[[Image:Eva3-33 C1419 comp.jpg|thumb|200px|[[Eva-13]] with spears and halo, floating below the Door.]] |caption= }} {{stub}} [[Category: A to Z]]
html:
NGE NTE

The Doors of Guf (ガフの扉, Gafu no Tobira) appear in the form of a black void surrounded by multicolored rings.

The events at the end of Evangelion 2.0 resulted in Near Third Impact, wherein Shinji's attempt to save Rei from the 10th Angel caused Eva-01 to open the Doors of Guf. The Door formed from Eva-01's halo and was surrounded by slowly rotating red and white rings. The portal was dissipated when Eva-01 was struck with the Spear of Cassius, but it is unknown if the Door was fully closed after this event.

In Evangelion 3.0, an awakened Eva-13 opens the Doors of Guf during Fourth Impact. This Door is larger than the previous version and surrounded by multicoloured rotating rings. It is closed after Kaworu impales Eva-13 with two Spears of Longinus.

Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 reveals that the space behind the Doors of Guf is called Anti-Universe.

Door of Guf Portals


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!

chunks.content:
Article: Guf (NTE)
NGE NTE

The Doors of Guf (ガフの扉, Gafu no Tobira) appear in the form of a black void surrounded by multicolored rings. 

The events at the end of Evangelion 2.0 resulted in Near Third Impact, wherein Shinji's attempt to save Rei from the 10th Angel caused Eva-01 to open the Doors of Guf. The Door formed from Eva-01's halo and was surrounded by slowly rotating red and white rings. The portal was dissipated when Eva-01 was struck with the Spear of Cassius, but it is unknown if the Door was fully closed after this event.

In Evangelion 3.0, an awakened Eva-13 opens the Doors of Guf during Fourth Impact. This Door is larger than the previous version and surrounded by multicoloured rotating rings. It is closed after Kaworu impales Eva-13 with two Spears of Longinus.

Evangelion 3.0 + 1.0 reveals that the space behind the Doors of Guf is called Anti-Universe.
